TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: Medicare Inpatient, Skilled Nursing Facility, Home Health, and Hospice Claims Files (derived) 

VALUES: XX 

COMMENT: CCW calculates this variable as the count of all claims from the IP, SNF, HHA, and hospice claims files. 

The corresponding Medicare payment information for Part A claims is in the 
MDCR_PTA_TOTAL_FFS_SPEND variable.
